# Best AI Tools for Remote Teams in 2026 — Boost Your Productivity

Remote teams can feel chaotic without the right tools. Let's look at the best AI tools to keep your remote team aligned, productive, and happy!

For more productivity tools, check out our [[link:/category/Productivity|Productivity category]]!

---

## Quick Comparison Table

| Tool | Best For | Pricing | Key Features |
|------|-----------|---------|---------------|
| [[link:/tools/52|ClickUp AI]] | Project management | $7+/month | AI sprint planning, meeting summaries |
| [[link:/tools/100|Notion AI]] | Knowledge base | $10+/month | AI docs, knowledge management |
| [[link:/tools/53|Todoist AI]] | Task prioritization | $4+/month | Smart task sorting, AI suggestions |

---

## 1. Project Management: ClickUp AI

[[link:/tools/52|ClickUp AI]] turns your project management into an intelligent assistant that plans sprints, summarizes meetings, and creates action items automatically.

Perfect for remote teams that need to stay aligned across time zones.

---

## 2. Knowledge Management: Notion AI

[[link:/tools/100|Notion AI]] is your remote team's second brain! Summarize long docs, answer FAQs, and brainstorm together in one workspace.

---

## 3. Task Management: Todoist AI

[[link:/tools/53|Todoist AI]] helps your team prioritize tasks so everyone focuses on what matters.

---

## Bonus: Video & Communication

For video calls with AI summaries: use Otter.ai or Fireflies.ai (but we focus on tools we track on our site! For more, explore the Productivity category.

---

## Final Tips for Remote Teams

1. Start with 1-2 tools first to avoid overwhelm
2. Train your team on 1 tool at a time
3. Iterate based on feedback
